class.name: OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnifiedConfigurationPlane
class.brief_description: The configuration used when creating the unified spatial context with planes.

method.name: get_enabled_components
method.description: Returns the components enabled by this configuration. [b]Note:[/b] Only valid after [method init].

method.name: init
method.description: Initializes this [OpenXRSpatialEntitiesUnifiedConfigurationPlane]. Detects mesh2d when [param supports_mesh_2d] is [code]true[/code]. Detects polygons when [param supports_polygons] is [code]true[/code]. Detects labels when [param supports_labels] is [code]true[/code].
